parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.disparo_log (anuncio_id, user_id, score, enviado_em)
VALUES ({{ $('Montar Body Template').item.json.anuncio_id }}, {{ $('Montar Body Template').item.json.candidato_id }}, {{ $('Montar Body Template').item.json.score }}, now());

WITH anuncios AS (
  SELECT
    b.id            AS anuncio_id,
    b.product_id,
    b.creator_id    AS anunciante_id,
    b.created,
    addr.city_id    AS anuncio_city_id,
    c.state_id      AS anuncio_state_id
  FROM an_prod_cbc.bids b
  LEFT JOIN an_prod_cbc.users au        ON au.id = b.creator_id
  LEFT JOIN an_prod_cbc.business_profiles abp ON abp.id = au.business_id
  LEFT JOIN an_prod_cbc.addresses addr  ON addr.id = abp.address_id
  LEFT JOIN an_prod_types.cities c      ON c.id = addr.city_id
  WHERE b.operation_id = 2
    AND b.status_id = 1
    AND b.created >= now() - interval '24 hours'
    AND b.deleted IS DISTINCT FROM true
),
candidatos AS (
  SELECT a.anuncio_id, a.product_id, a.anunciante_id, a.created,
         a.anuncio_city_id, a.anuncio_state_id,
         up.user_id AS candidato_id, 'interesse'::text AS fonte
  FROM anuncios a
  JOIN an_prod_cbc.product_interesteds pi
    ON pi.product_id = a.product_id AND pi.buy = true
   AND pi.deleted IS DISTINCT FROM true
  JOIN an_prod_cbc.user_preferences up ON up.id = pi.preference_id
  UNION
  SELECT a.anuncio_id, a.product_id, a.anunciante_id, a.created,
         a.anuncio_city_id, a.anuncio_state_id,
         nh.user_id AS candidato_id, 'navegacao'::text AS fonte
  FROM anuncios a
  JOIN an_prod_cbc.navigation_histories nh ON nh.bid_id = a.anuncio_id
   AND nh.created >= now() - interval '72 hours'
   AND nh.deleted IS DISTINCT FROM true
),
loc AS (
  SELECT c.*,
         cu.business_id AS cand_business_id,
         caddr.city_id AS cand_city_id,
         cc.state_id   AS cand_state_id
  FROM candidatos c
  LEFT JOIN an_prod_cbc.users cu       ON cu.id = c.candidato_id
  LEFT JOIN an_prod_cbc.business_profiles cbp ON cbp.id = cu.business_id
  LEFT JOIN an_prod_cbc.addresses caddr ON caddr.id = cbp.address_id
  LEFT JOIN an_prod_types.cities cc     ON cc.id = caddr.city_id
),
-- ===== Telefone normalizado (fonte real: phones) =====
tel_norm AS (
  SELECT
    bp.id AS profile_id,
    ph.type_id,
    CASE
      WHEN length(regexp_replace(ph.number,'\D','','g'))=13 AND left(regexp_replace(ph.number,'\D','','g'),2)='55'
        THEN regexp_replace(ph.number,'\D','','g')
      WHEN length(regexp_replace(ph.number,'\D','','g'))=12 AND left(regexp_replace(ph.number,'\D','','g'),2)='55'
        THEN substr(regexp_replace(ph.number,'\D','','g'),1,4)||'9'||substr(regexp_replace(ph.number,'\D','','g'),5)
      WHEN length(regexp_replace(ph.number,'\D','','g'))=11
        THEN '55'||regexp_replace(ph.number,'\D','','g')
      WHEN length(regexp_replace(ph.number,'\D','','g'))=10
        THEN '55'||substr(regexp_replace(ph.number,'\D','','g'),1,2)||'9'||substr(regexp_replace(ph.number,'\D','','g'),3)
      ELSE NULL
    END AS e164
  FROM an_prod_cbc.business_profiles bp
  JOIN an_prod_cbc.profile_phones pp ON pp.profile_id = bp.id
  JOIN an_prod_cbc.phones ph ON ph.id = pp.phone_id
  WHERE ph.deleted IS DISTINCT FROM true AND ph.number IS NOT NULL
),
tel_validos AS (
  SELECT profile_id, type_id, e164
  FROM tel_norm
  WHERE e164 IS NOT NULL
    AND length(e164)=13
    AND substr(e164,3,2) BETWEEN '11' AND '99'   -- DDD BR válido
    AND substr(e164,5,1)='9'                      -- celular (tem o 9)
),
tel_melhor AS (
  SELECT profile_id,
    (ARRAY_AGG(e164 ORDER BY CASE WHEN type_id=2 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END))[1] AS telefone
  FROM tel_validos
  GROUP BY profile_id
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  l.anuncio_id, l.product_id,
  prod.name AS produto_nome,
  l.candidato_id,
  tm.telefone,                       -- <<< telefone já normalizado E.164 (13 díg)
  u.email AS candidato_email,
  string_agg(DISTINCT l.fonte, '+') AS fontes,
  CASE
    WHEN l.cand_city_id  = l.anuncio_city_id  THEN 100
    WHEN l.cand_state_id = l.anuncio_state_id THEN 60
    ELSE 20
  END AS score
FROM loc l
JOIN an_prod_cbc.users u ON u.id = l.candidato_id
LEFT JOIN an_prod_types.products prod ON prod.id = l.product_id
JOIN tel_melhor tm ON tm.profile_id = l.cand_business_id   -- só quem tem telefone válido
LEFT JOIN public.disparo_log dl
  ON dl.anuncio_id = l.anuncio_id AND dl.user_id = l.candidato_id
WHERE l.candidato_id <> l.anunciante_id
  AND dl.id IS NULL
GROUP BY l.anuncio_id, l.product_id, prod.name, l.candidato_id,
         tm.telefone, u.email,
         l.cand_city_id, l.anuncio_city_id, l.cand_state_id, l.anuncio_state_id
ORDER BY l.anuncio_id, score DESC

limit 30

fieldValues.fieldValue:
=Olá! tudo bem? 😊 Sou a Luana, da AgroNegociar.

Você demonstrou interesse em {{ $('Montar Body Template').item.json.resultado.template.components[0].parameters[0].text }}, e agora temos anúncios ativos desse produto na plataforma, além de outras oportunidades que podem te interessar.

Quer que eu te mostre o que tem disponível agora?
